---
title: 'Prayer Time 6/22/19 - Regarding Shelley God''s rebuke and comfort'
date: '2019-06-22T17:39:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3547062730353887880'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/prayer-time-62219-regarding-shelley.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Shelley'
---

<div>
https://www.facebook.com/TheMissionVacaville/videos/2445605795489709/</div>
<div>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
<div>
Serve the World Around You.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
It's time to see a bigger picture than your felt need.&nbsp;</div>
<br />
60 days feels like an eternity because you still feel a need for her. I need you to need me instead.<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190621-194607-0b303883224b.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190621-194607-3f0dda04e590.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083301-a21561171adc.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083301-da4f89bc340e.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083307-8c0394c3419a.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083307-b1515dd54eb9.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083320-6f4130642481.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083320-853164dac048.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083330-8e84e64e49f2.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083330-fa91ed45f778.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083336-2e6d66298b70.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083336-4bdc50be27f0.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083341-69363db0eff5.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083341-4fad7c384920.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083346-8b3ea4e7e36f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083346-9f32c53dd27c.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083351-5568cbc6edc1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083351-c189069e5813.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083355-b20a38e85977.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083355-4a50f97966df.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083400-ca45b737bec9.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083400-ec5639367344.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083405-96626929d660.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083405-519975ada54b.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083409-a48a6ae135ba.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190622-083409-6ba02de91571.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
